targets.query:
from(bucket: "energy_metrics")
  |> range(start: -30m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy" and r._field == "voltage")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "energy_metrics")
  |> range(start: -30m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy" and r._field == "totalPower")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "energy_metrics")
  |> range(start: -30m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy" and r._field == "energyTotal")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "energy_metrics")
  |> range(start: -30m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy" and r._field == "battery")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "energy_metrics")
  |> range(start: -30m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy" and r._field == "voltage")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: int(v: uint(v: now()) - uint(v: r._time)) / 1000000000}))

from(bucket: "energy_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy" and r._field == "totalPower")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "energy_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy" and r._field == "voltage")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "energy_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy" and r._field == "power_r")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Phase R"}))

from(bucket: "energy_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy" and r._field == "power_y")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Phase Y"}))

from(bucket: "energy_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy" and r._field == "power_b")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Phase B"}))

from(bucket: "energy_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy" and r._field == "current_r")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Phase R"}))

from(bucket: "energy_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy" and r._field == "current_y")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Phase Y"}))

from(bucket: "energy_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy" and r._field == "current_b")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Phase B"}))

from(bucket: "energy_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy" and r._field == "battery")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "energy_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "energy" and r._field == "energyTotal")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
